positive: A stylized, abstract depiction of a vibrant forest biome, focusing on illuminated bioluminescent flora and fauna. The central composition features intertwined, stylized vines and exotic, glowing leaves creating a natural mandala pattern. Incorporate elements of geometric symmetry and clean, distinct outlines. The color palette should be dominated by deep indigo, electric teal, emerald green, and pops of luminous gold. The style should be a mix of Art Nouveau elegance and high-contrast, modern line art, making it highly visible on fabric. Perfect for repeat pattern or single central print.
negative: low resolution, blurry, grainy, watermark, text, signature, logo, copyright, fuzzy, artifacts, cropped, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, abstract grunge, noise
